languages.text: Техножрецы отреагировали с неменьшей слаженностью. Словно шестерни единого механизма, они сомкнули цепь, образуя непроницаемую преграду из собственных аугментированных тел. Тяжелые плазменные излучатели взмыли вверх, и залп ударил по некронам, испепеляя и отбрасывая их назад.
languages.translation_comment: Если выбрана реплика Паскаля ИЛИ пройден чек. Скрытность +1

traits.locale_text: Техножрецы действовали с пугающей, нечеловеческой слаженностью, ведомые импульсами ноосферы. Словно шестерни единого механизма, они одновременно шагнули вперед и сомкнули цепь, образуя непроницаемую преграду из собственных аугментированных тел. В их движениях не было ни суеты, ни страха — лишь холодный расчет. Тяжелые плазменные излучатели взмыли вверх в идеальной синхронности, и залп ударил в надвигающийся рой, с гулким ревом обращая созданий в ничто.

languages.text: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.
languages.original_text: Техножрецы отреагировали с неменьшей слаженностью. Словно шестерни единого механизма, они сомкнули цепь, образуя непроницаемую преграду из собственных аугментированных тел. Тяжелые плазменные излучатели взмыли вверх, и залп ударил по некронам, испепеляя и отбрасывая их назад.

traits.locale_text: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma emitters were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

The Tech-Priests acted with frightening cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed in, forming an impenetrable barrier out of their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma emitters soared upward, and a volley struck the oncoming swarm, turning the creatures to nothing with a resounding roar.

The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma emitters soared upward, and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma emitters were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

languages.text: 技术神甫们的反应整齐划一。他们如同一台机器上的齿轮，迅速收拢阵型，用自己的改造之躯筑起一道坚不可摧的屏障。重型等离子武器抬起，一轮齐射轰向太空死灵，将其焚毁逼退。
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

traits.locale_text: 技术神甫们的反应整齐划一。他们如同一台机器上的齿轮，迅速收拢阵型，用自己的改造之躯筑起一道坚不可摧的屏障。重型等离子武器抬起，一轮齐射轰向太空死灵，将其焚毁逼退。

languages.text: Los tecnosacerdotes reaccionaron con la misma disciplina. Como engranajes de una única máquina, cerraron filas, formando una barrera impenetrable con sus cuerpos aumentados. Las armas de plasma pesadas desataron una andanada contra los Necrones, incinerándolos y obligándolos a retroceder.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

traits.locale_text: Los tecnosacerdotes reaccionaron con la misma disciplina. Como engranajes de una única máquina, cerraron filas, formando una barrera impenetrable con sus cuerpos aumentados. Las armas de plasma pesadas desataron una andanada contra los Necrones, incinerándolos y obligándolos a retroceder.

languages.text: Les technoprêtres passèrent à l'action avec la même cohésion. Tels les rouages d'une seule et même machine, ils resserrèrent leurs rangs, formant une barrière impénétrable avec leurs corps augmentés. Des armes plasma lourdes s'élevèrent, et une salve vint frapper les Nécrons, réduisant les créatures en cendres et repoussant leur assaut.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

traits.locale_text: Les technoprêtres passèrent à l'action avec la même cohésion. Tels les rouages d'une seule et même machine, ils resserrèrent leurs rangs, formant une barrière impénétrable avec leurs corps augmentés. Des armes plasma lourdes s'élevèrent, et une salve vint frapper les Nécrons, réduisant les créatures en cendres et repoussant leur assaut.

languages.text: Tekno Rahipler de aynı uyumla karşılık verdi. Tek bir makinenin dişlileri gibi saflarını sıklaştırdılar ve kendi ogmentli vücutlarıyla aşılmaz bir bariyer oluşturdular. Ağır plazma silahları kaldırıldı ve bir salvo, Nekronları vurarak onları geri püskürttü, yakıp kül etti.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

traits.locale_text: Tekno Rahipler de aynı uyumla karşılık verdi. Tek bir makinenin dişlileri gibi saflarını sıklaştırdılar ve kendi ogmentli vücutlarıyla aşılmaz bir bariyer oluşturdular. Ağır plazma silahları kaldırıldı ve bir salvo, Nekronları vurarak onları geri püskürttü, yakıp kül etti.

languages.text: Die Techpriester reagierten mit demselben Zusammenhalt. Wie die Zahnräder einer Maschine schlossen sie ihre Reihen und bildeten mit ihren augmentierten Körpern eine undurchdringliche Barriere. Eine Salve schwerer Plasmawaffen setzte die Necrons in Brand und warf sie zurück.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.

traits.locale_text: Die Techpriester reagierten mit demselben Zusammenhalt. Wie die Zahnräder einer Maschine schlossen sie ihre Reihen und bildeten mit ihren augmentierten Körpern eine undurchdringliche Barriere. Eine Salve schwerer Plasmawaffen setzte die Necrons in Brand und warf sie zurück.

languages.text: テク・プリーストたちは恐ろしいほど結束して行動した。単一の機械の歯車のように、彼らは近づいてきて、強化された自身の身体で、敵の侵入を遮断する壁を築いた。重火器のプラズマ放出装置が上空に飛び上がり、敵の群れを襲撃し、轟音と共に、敵は消滅した。
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests acted with frightening cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed in, forming an impenetrable barrier out of their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma emitters soared upward, and a volley struck the oncoming swarm, turning the creatures to nothing with a resounding roar.

traits.locale_text: テク・プリーストたちは恐ろしいほど結束して行動した。単一の機械の歯車のように、彼らは近づいてきて、強化された自身の身体で、敵の侵入を遮断する壁を築いた。重火器のプラズマ放出装置が上空に飛び上がり、敵の群れを襲撃し、轟音と共に、敵は消滅した。
